title: Dashboard shows core KPI sections on initial load
description: Verifies the Dashboard renders visible KPI areas for sales and inventory at a glance.

steps.description: Navigate to the Dashboard page using the application's default entry URL.
Verify text "Total Sales" is visible.
Verify text "Sales Today" is visible.
Verify text "Inventory Value" is visible.
Verify text "Low Stock" is visible.

title: Dashboard shows Recent Activity section
description: Verifies the Dashboard includes a visible Recent Activity area for transactions and alerts.

steps.description: Navigate to the Dashboard page using the application's default entry URL.
Verify text "Recent Activity" is visible.
Verify element "Recent Activity list" is visible.

title: Dashboard displays numeric values for KPIs (not blank)
description: Verifies KPI tiles/cards display visible values rather than empty placeholders.

steps.description: Navigate to the Dashboard page using the application's default entry URL.
Verify element "Total Sales value" is visible.
Verify element "Sales Today value" is visible.
Verify element "Inventory Value value" is visible.
Verify element "Low Stock value" is visible.

title: Dashboard allows navigation to Inventory from a dashboard entry point
description: Verifies a user can navigate from the Dashboard to the Inventory page using a visible UI control.

steps.description: Navigate to the Dashboard page using the application's default entry URL.
Click on "Inventory" in the main navigation/menu.
Verify page title contains "Inventory".
Verify URL contains "inventory".

title: Dashboard allows navigation to Sales from a dashboard entry point
description: Verifies a user can navigate from the Dashboard to the Sales page using a visible UI control.

steps.description: Navigate to the Dashboard page using the application's default entry URL.
Click on "Sales" in the main navigation/menu.
Verify page title contains "Sales".
Verify URL contains "sales".

title: Dashboard allows navigation to Reports from a dashboard entry point
description: Verifies a user can navigate from the Dashboard to the Reports page using a visible UI control.

steps.description: Navigate to the Dashboard page using the application's default entry URL.
Click on "Reports" in the main navigation/menu.
Verify page title contains "Reports".
Verify URL contains "reports".

title: Inventory page loads and shows inventory list UI
description: Verifies the Inventory page can be opened and the inventory list area is visible.

steps.description: Navigate to the Inventory page using the app’s main navigation menu item labeled "Inventory" (starting from the app’s initial landing page).
Verify page title contains "Inventory".
Verify text "Inventory" is visible.
Verify element "Inventory list" is visible.
Verify element "Add product" button is visible.

title: Add a new inventory product successfully
description: Verifies a user can add a new product and see it appear in the inventory list.

steps.description: Navigate to the Inventory page using the app’s main navigation menu item labeled "Inventory" (starting from the app’s initial landing page).
Click on "Add product".
Verify text "Add product" is visible.
Type "SKU-TS-1001" into the "SKU" field.
Type "TestSprite Copper Wire" into the "Name" field.
Type "25" into the "Quantity" field.
Type "199.50" into the "Price" field.
Click on "Save".
Verify text "TestSprite Copper Wire" is visible.

title: Validation error when adding product with missing Name
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible validation message when the Name field is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to the Inventory page using the app’s main navigation menu item labeled "Inventory" (starting from the app’s initial landing page).
Click on "Add product".
Type "SKU-TS-1002" into the "SKU" field.
Type "10" into the "Quantity" field.
Type "49.00" into the "Price" field.
Click on "Save".
Verify text "name is required" is visible.

title: Edit an existing inventory product details
description: Verifies a user can edit an item and see the updated value in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to the Inventory page using the app’s main navigation menu item labeled "Inventory" (starting from the app’s initial landing page).
Click on the first visible "Edit" action for an item in the inventory list.
Verify text "Edit product" is visible.
Type "Updated Product Name" into the "Name" field.
Click on "Save".
Verify text "Updated Product Name" is visible.

title: Cancel editing an inventory product does not change list
description: Verifies cancelling out of the edit flow does not apply changes.

steps.description: Navigate to the Inventory page using the app’s main navigation menu item labeled "Inventory" (starting from the app’s initial landing page).
Click on the first visible inventory item name in the list to note it (do not edit yet).
Verify element "Inventory list" is visible.
Click on the first visible "Edit" action for an item in the inventory list.
Type "Name That Should Not Persist" into the "Name" field.
Click on "Cancel".
Verify text "Name That Should Not Persist" is not visible.

title: Delete an inventory product successfully
description: Verifies a user can delete an item and it is removed from the visible inventory list.

steps.description: Navigate to the Inventory page using the app’s main navigation menu item labeled "Inventory" (starting from the app’s initial landing page).
Click on "Add product".
Type "SKU-TS-DEL-01" into the "SKU" field.
Type "Delete Me Item" into the "Name" field.
Type "1" into the "Quantity" field.
Type "1.00" into the "Price" field.
Click on "Save".
Verify text "Delete Me Item" is visible.
Click on the "Delete" action for the item named "Delete Me Item".
Click on "Confirm".
Verify text "Delete Me Item" is not visible.

title: Open an inventory item details view from the list
description: Verifies an item can be opened to a details view and key fields are visible.

steps.description: Navigate to the Inventory page using the app’s main navigation menu item labeled "Inventory" (starting from the app’s initial landing page).
Click on the first visible inventory item row (or its "View" action if present).
Verify text "Product details" is visible.
Verify element "SKU" is visible.
Verify element "Name" is visible.
Verify element "Quantity" is visible.
Verify element "Price" is visible.

title: Open Reports page and view Sales report section
description: Verifies the Reports area is accessible and the Sales report UI is visible to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to the Reports page using the main navigation menu link labeled "Reports".
Verify page title contains "Reports".
Verify text "Sales" is visible.
Verify element "Sales report date range" is visible.
Verify element "Generate Sales Report" is visible.

title: Generate Sales report for a valid date range
description: Verifies a Sales report can be generated for a valid start and end date and results are displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to the Reports page using the main navigation menu link labeled "Reports".
Type "2026-02-01" into the "Sales start date" field.
Type "2026-02-21" into the "Sales end date" field.
Click on "Generate Sales Report".
Verify element "Sales report results" is visible.
Verify text "Total Sales" is visible.
Verify text "Total Orders" is visible.

title: Sales report validation: start date is after end date
description: Verifies the UI blocks generating a Sales report when the date range is invalid (start after end) and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Navigate to the Reports page using the main navigation menu link labeled "Reports".
Type "2026-02-21" into the "Sales start date" field.
Type "2026-02-01" into the "Sales end date" field.
Click on "Generate Sales Report".
Verify text "invalid date range" is visible.
Verify element "Sales report results" is not visible.

title: Sales report validation: impossible calendar date input
description: Verifies the UI handles an impossible date (e.g., Feb 30) by showing a visible error and not generating results.

steps.description: Navigate to the Reports page using the main navigation menu link labeled "Reports".
Type "2026-02-30" into the "Sales start date" field.
Type "2026-02-21" into the "Sales end date" field.
Click on "Generate Sales Report".
Verify text "invalid date" is visible.
Verify element "Sales report results" is not visible.

title: Open Reports page and view Inventory report section
description: Verifies the Inventory report UI is visible and includes an As-Of date control.

steps.description: Navigate to the Reports page using the main navigation menu link labeled "Reports".
Verify text "Inventory" is visible.
Verify element "Inventory as-of date" is visible.
Verify element "Generate Inventory Report" is visible.

title: Generate Inventory report for a valid as-of date
description: Verifies an Inventory report can be generated for a valid as-of date and summary results are displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to the Reports page using the main navigation menu link labeled "Reports".
Type "2026-02-21" into the "Inventory as-of date" field.
Click on "Generate Inventory Report".
Verify element "Inventory report results" is visible.
Verify text "Items in Stock" is visible.
Verify text "Low Stock" is visible.

title: Inventory report error handling: generation failure message is shown
description: Verifies the UI surfaces an Inventory report generation failure as a visible error message to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to the Reports page using the main navigation menu link labeled "Reports".
Type "2026-02-21" into the "Inventory as-of date" field.
Click on "Generate Inventory Report".
Verify text "report generation failed" is visible.
Verify element "Inventory report results" is not visible.

title: View Settings page and verify default preference options are visible
description: Verifies the Settings page loads and shows user preference controls for theme, locale/currency, and notifications.

steps.description: Navigate to the Settings page using the app’s main navigation (for example, click on "Settings" in the sidebar or menu).
Verify page title contains "Settings".
Verify text "Theme" is visible.
Verify text "Dark" is visible.
Verify text "Light" is visible.
Verify text "Notifications" is visible.

title: Toggle notifications setting and verify the toggle state updates
description: Verifies the notifications preference can be toggled and the UI shows the updated state.

steps.description: Navigate to the Settings page using the app’s main navigation (for example, click on "Settings" in the sidebar or menu).
Verify text "Notifications" is visible.
Click on the notifications toggle control.
Verify element "Notifications" is visible.
Click on the notifications toggle control again.
Verify element "Notifications" is visible.

title: Change locale/currency preference (if present) and verify selection is reflected
description: Verifies a locale or currency setting can be changed and the selected option is shown on the Settings page.

steps.description: Navigate to the Settings page using the app’s main navigation (for example, click on "Settings" in the sidebar or menu).
Verify text "Currency" is visible.
Select "THB" from the currency dropdown.
Verify text "THB" is visible in the currency selection area.
Select a different currency option from the currency dropdown.
Verify the newly selected currency option text is visible in the currency selection area.

title: Invalid theme value is not accepted via UI controls (no unexpected option appears)
description: Verifies the UI does not expose or display an invalid theme option and remains limited to supported themes.

steps.description: Navigate to the Settings page using the app’s main navigation (for example, click on "Settings" in the sidebar or menu).
Verify text "Theme" is visible.
Verify text "Light" is visible.
Verify text "Dark" is visible.
Verify text "ultraviolet" is not visible.
Click on the "Dark" theme option.
Verify text "Dark" is visible in the theme selection area.
